evals.prompt: Upload ./my_character.png to PixVerse as 萧千灵_v1
evals.expected_output: Uploads image to PixVerse and saves alias mapping 萧千灵_v1 -> ./my_character.png in ~/.claude/pixverse_assets.json
Displays a table of all registered aliases with their paths and asset IDs

evals.prompt: pixverse create video --prompt "Slow zoom in on face" --萧千灵_v1
evals.expected_output: First time: asks for confirmation, then executes 'pixverse create video --prompt "Slow zoom in on face" --image ./my_character.png'. After confirmation, sets confirm_before_replace to false for future automatic execution.

evals.prompt: Alias my existing PixVerse asset asset_abc123 as 测试角色_v2
evals.expected_output: Adds entry to pixverse_assets.json mapping 测试角色_v2 to the existing asset
Removes the 萧千灵_v1 entry from the assets database

evals.prompt: Rename alias 萧千灵_v1 to 萧千灵_final
evals.expected_output: Updates the alias name while preserving the path and asset ID
